svg.title: Bearing Fault Diagnosis Project Architecture
svg.desc: Full ML pipeline diagram from raw CWRU .mat files through preprocessing, two parallel branches (handcrafted features and deep learning), and final training, evaluation, and inference layers.
svg.text: Benchmarked against classical ML at every load condition
Controlled subset: DE only · 12 kHz only · 4 classes · 2048 window · Cross-load robustness
Bearing Fault Diagnosis · CWRU Dataset · Full Pipeline Architecture
Preprocessing → Feature Extraction / DL Modelling → Training → Evaluation → Inference
